summary: Made surgical seam polish edits to improve adjacency continuity: the opening now anchors to chapter 15's green-folder MoneyGram stubs while keeping the same train departure beat, and the final Nora text now matches chapter 17's opening instruction wording.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph to start on the clipped MoneyGram stubs in Eli's folder before the Reno sway beat.
Kept original opening scene facts/tone intact while shifting the first action away from a transit-arrival scaffold.
Aligned Nora's final text to: 'wait outside until I open the door. Basement first. No June's room tonight.' for direct handoff into chapter 17.
Condensed Eli's text reply to 'Understood.' to avoid overwriting chapter 17's opening beat.
